note: Canonical index of Nuthatch nests. The website (nuthatch-indexer.com/nests) builds from this file.

nests.name: ERC-20 token
nests.summary: Any ERC-20 — transfers, holders and supply. Generated straight from the contract address; no repo to clone.
nests.note: Generic decode — works for any token today. The example above is USDC.

nests.name: ERC-721 / ERC-1155 NFT
nests.summary: Any NFT collection — ownership and full transfer history, resolved from the collection address.
nests.note: Generic decode — works for any collection today. The example above is BAYC.

nests.name: Graph Network (Horizon)
nests.summary: The Graph's own protocol state — staking provisions, allocations, delegation, curation and rewards. The data every indexer pays GRT to read today.
nests.events: ProvisionCreated, AllocationCreated, AllocationClosed, TokensDelegated, Signalled, HorizonRewardsAssigned
nests.note: Covers the Horizon staking/service surface today (operators, allocations, delegations, rewards); extending to the full network-subgraph surface — Indexer Directory, Curation, Epochs (RFC-0011).

nests.name: Epoch Block Oracle
nests.summary: The per-epoch canonical block for every indexed chain — the reference all indexers use to close multichain allocations consistently.
nests.events: DataEdge calldata payloads (EventfulDataEdge emits on Arbitrum)
nests.note: Needs the calldata decoder (the node-independent RFC-0014 slice).

nests.name: QoS / Rewards-Eligibility Oracle
nests.summary: Indexer quality-of-service and reward eligibility — off-chain gateway telemetry posted on-chain.
nests.note: On-chain shape still consolidating post-Horizon — a watch-and-follow target.

nests.name: Uniswap V3
nests.summary: Concentrated-liquidity DEX — pools, swaps, positions, TVL and fees. The showcase for factory discovery: one nest tracks every pool.
nests.events: PoolCreated, Swap, Mint, Burn, Collect, Flash

nests.name: Aave V3
nests.summary: The lending flagship — supplies, borrows, repayments, liquidations and rates across 20+ chains.

nests.name: ENS
nests.summary: The archetypal name-service index — registrations, expiries, resolvers and records across the registry and registrar.

nests.name: Uniswap V2 + Sushiswap
nests.summary: Constant-product AMM — the simpler Uniswap, and the template Sushiswap reuses. One nest, two protocols.

nests.name: Compound V2 + V3
nests.summary: cToken and Comet money-markets — supply, borrow, repayment and liquidation.

nests.name: Lido
nests.summary: The liquid-staking leader — stETH/wstETH deposits, withdrawals, rebases and oracle reporting.

nests.name: Seaport (OpenSea)
nests.summary: The protocol behind the largest NFT marketplace — order fulfilment and cancellation.

nests.name: Curve
nests.summary: StableSwap AMM — pools, exchanges and liquidity with invariant pricing.

nests.name: EigenLayer
nests.summary: Restaking — operator registration, staker delegation, deposits and withdrawals.

nests.name: GMX
nests.summary: Perpetuals — position lifecycle, PnL and liquidations.

nests.name: MakerDAO / Sky
nests.summary: The DAI/USDS CDP engine — vaults, collateral and liquidations.
